data.title: Pan Global Resources Advances Exploration in Spain with Promising Results
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest update is out from Pan Global Resources ( (TSE:PGZ) ).

Pan Global Resources has made significant progress in its Escacena and Cármenes projects in Spain. At the Escacena Project, near-surface mineralization at La Romana has been extended by 300 meters, indicating expansion potential, while the Bravo target exploration was completed, and additional geophysical anomalies were identified. Advanced metallurgical tests showed promising results, bolstering the project’s prospects. The Cármenes Project commenced exploration, highlighting potential for new discoveries. The company’s strategic financing efforts raised C$7.2 million, attracting major investors and supporting further exploration activities.

More about Pan Global Resources

Pan Global Resources Inc. is focused on copper-rich mineral deposits, targeting the growing supply-demand balance for copper driven by global electrification and energy transitions. The flagship Escacena Project is situated in the Iberian Pyrite Belt, a strategic mining location supported by the European Commission. The company emphasizes safe operations and environmental respect, aligning with the United Nations Global Compact principles.

YTD Price Performance: 3.57%

Average Trading Volume: 231,200

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$44.06M

data.title: NioCorp to Present at 2025 Mining Conference Amid Positive Market Outlook
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

NioCorp Developments ( (NB) ) has shared an update.

NioCorp Developments Ltd. announced that its CEO, Mark A. Smith, will speak at the 2025 Mining Conference, highlighting the Elk Creek Critical Minerals Project and discussing broader trends in mineral development and global supply chains. The announcement comes as Maxim Group initiated equity research coverage on NioCorp with a buy rating, indicating a positive outlook for the company’s strategic positioning in the critical minerals market.

More about NioCorp Developments

NioCorp Developments Ltd. is focused on developing a critical minerals project in Southeast Nebraska, aimed at producing niobium, scandium, and titanium. These minerals are essential for manufacturing specialty alloys, high-strength steel, and various lightweight and corrosion-resistant materials used in automotive, aerospace, and other applications. The company is also exploring the production of rare earth elements crucial for advanced magnets used in defense and civilian technologies.

data.title: Observe Medical ASA Completes Share Capital Increase for Reverse Share Split
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Observe Medical ASA ( (DE:OM5A) ) has shared an announcement.

Observe Medical ASA has completed a share capital increase, following a general meeting resolution, to facilitate a reverse share split in a 15:1 ratio. This adjustment, now registered with the Norwegian Register of Business Enterprises, is part of the company’s strategy to optimize its capital structure, potentially enhancing its market positioning and shareholder value.

More about Observe Medical ASA

Observe Medical is a Nordic medtech company specializing in innovative medical technology products aimed at enhancing patient care, clinical data accuracy, and health economics. The company focuses on urine measurement and ultrasound technologies and aims to grow through strategic M&A and distribution partnerships. Headquartered in Oslo, Norway, it serves a global market with a network of leading distributors.

data.title: Fu Yu Corporation Faces Leadership Restructuring at EGM
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

An update from Fu Yu Corporation Limited ( (SG:F13) ) is now available.

Fu Yu Corporation Limited has received a requisition from Victor Lim, who holds a significant shareholding in the company, to convene an Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM). The purpose of the EGM is to vote on the removal of two current directors, Mr. Huang Junli and Mr. Tan Tong Loong, and the appointment of three new independent directors, Mr. Gilbert L. Rodrigues, Mr. Ralf Pilarczyk, and Mr. Yang Zhenrong. This move could potentially lead to a significant shift in the company’s board structure, impacting its governance and strategic direction.

More about Fu Yu Corporation Limited

data.title: Collective Mining Reveals Promising Assay Results from Trap and Plutus Targets
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Collective Mining ( (TSE:CNL) ) has shared an update.

Collective Mining Ltd. announced the final assay results from its 2024 drill program at the Trap and Plutus targets within the Guayabales Project in Colombia. The results confirmed a high-grade gold-rich vein system at the Trap target and further mineralization at the Plutus target. The company plans to focus its 2025 drill program on expanding the Trap system northwest, potentially revealing a porphyry feeder system. The discovery and ongoing developments are significant for the company’s operational expansion and strategic positioning in the gold mining sector.

More about Collective Mining

Collective Mining Ltd. operates within the mining industry, focusing on exploration and development of mineral properties. The company is particularly engaged in gold mining, with significant projects located in Colombia, including the multi-target Guayabales Project.

data.description:

Tiger ( (GB:TIR) ) has provided an update.

Tiger Royalties and Investments PLC, a UK-based company, announced a significant change in its voting rights structure following an acquisition or disposal of voting rights by Premier Miton Group plc. As of January 9, 2025, Premier Miton Group has reached a threshold of 21.583023% of the voting rights in Tiger Royalties, indicating a strong influence over the company’s decision-making process. This change reflects Premier Miton Group’s strategic maneuver to potentially impact the governance or strategic direction of Tiger Royalties and Investments PLC.

data.title: Fortress Minerals Sees Revenue Dip Amid Lower Selling Prices, Maintains Healthy Margins
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

An announcement from Fortress Minerals Limited ( (SG:OAJ) ) is now available.

Fortress Minerals Limited reported a 7.6% year-on-year decrease in revenue to US$38.3 million for the first nine months of FY2025, attributed to lower average selling prices. Despite the decline, the company maintained a healthy profit margin of 64.4% and generated a net cash flow of US$9.7 million from operations. The Group emphasizes its strategy of expanding production capabilities to grow long-term shareholder value, supported by robust regional demand and stable offtake agreements.

More about Fortress Minerals Limited

Fortress Minerals Limited is a high-grade iron ore concentrate producer and exporter based in Malaysia. The company focuses on enhancing its production capabilities to expand and diversify its revenue streams, primarily serving strong regional demand through recurring offtake agreements.

Average Trading Volume: 11,433
